title: The Dager
description: A mode of fear that blinds and chases
body:
## <center>THE DAGER</center>

<center>This mod adds a creature that drowns you in darkness</center>



## <center>DESCRIPTION</center>

<center>This mod makes your minecraft experience horrible, it's very hard to escape from it when it sees you from a distance, it also plunges you into darkness and slows you down, making it very difficult to escape. When you want to fight it, it will be very difficult, so you will need powerful sets.</center>
